name: Wireless Sensing HAR (WiFi + UWB)
summary: Multimodal human-activity dataset combining WiFi CSI across three rooms with UWB channel impulse responses.

hardware.platform: WiFi CSI and commercial UWB sensing systems

settings.scenario: Human activities across three WiFi rooms and one UWB room

standardization.notes: Standardize WiFi independently while preserving synchronization and modality provenance when UWB is retained.
